title: GitHub Review by greptile-apps[bot]
summary: The reviewer flags three issues: (1) `RenderPluginConfig` silently overwrites config when two plugins share the same `ConfigSection` — it should either merge or error; (2) an empty `AppName` produces an invalid PasteDeploy pipeline directive and needs a guard; (3) `SetCondition`/`GetCondition` are hand-rolled instead of delegating to `k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/meta` as stated in the plan, losing Kubernetes-conventional validation (e.g., empty `Reason` is silently accepted).

code_comments.author: greptile-apps[bot]
code_comments.resolution: RenderPluginConfig's signature was changed to return (map[string]map[string]string, error). A duplicate-key check was added that returns a descriptive error (including the duplicate section name and the offending plugin name) when two plugins share the same ConfigSection. The godoc was updated to document this behavior. A dedicated test (TestRenderPluginConfig_duplicateConfigSectionReturnsError) was added, and existing tests were updated to assert no error on the happy path.

code_comments.body:
**Empty `AppName` produces an invalid PasteDeploy pipeline directive**

`spec.AppName` is appended to the pipeline slice unconditionally (line 59). When `AppName` is an empty string the resulting `pipeline = …` value ends with a trailing space (e.g. `"cors sizelimit "` instead of `"cors sizelimit app"`). PasteDeploy will fail to load the resulting `api-paste.ini` at runtime because the terminal application name resolves to an empty token.

There is no guard, no documentation stating that `AppName` must be non-empty, and no test covering this edge case.

Consider adding an early-return guard:

```go
// Build pipeline: [before] [base] [after] [app]
pipeline := make([]string, 0, len(beforeFilters)+len(spec.BaseFilters)+len(afterFilters)+1)
pipeline = append(pipeline, beforeFilters...)
pipeline = append(pipeline, spec.BaseFilters...)
pipeline = append(pipeline, afterFilters...)
if spec.AppName != "" {
    pipeline = append(pipeline, spec.AppName)
}
```
code_comments.author: greptile-apps[bot]
code_comments.resolution: An if-guard was added around the AppName append so that an empty AppName no longer produces a trailing space in the pipeline directive. A new test case ('empty AppName omits terminal app from pipeline') was added to cover this edge case.

code_comments.body:
**`SetCondition` and `GetCondition` are fully hand-rolled instead of delegating to `k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/meta`**

The PR description (and the story descriptions in `.planwerk/progress/`) explicitly state:

> `SetCondition` — delegates to `meta.SetStatusCondition`
> `GetCondition` — delegates to `meta.FindStatusCondition`

The implementation does not import `"k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/meta"` at all and reimplements both helpers from scratch. The two approaches differ in an important way: `meta.SetStatusCondition` panics when `condition.Reason` is empty or `condition.ObservedGeneration` is negative — enforcing the Kubernetes API conventions for conditions. The custom implementation silently accepts a zero-`Reason` condition and sets it without error.

This is a design divergence that will likely surprise future contributors who expect the Kubernetes-conventional strictness. If the looser validation is intentional (e.g. to ease testing), it should be documented in the godoc so that callers know the `Reason` field is not enforced here.
code_comments.author: greptile-apps[bot]
code_comments.resolution: The hand-rolled implementations of SetCondition and GetCondition were replaced with one-line delegations to meta.SetStatusCondition and meta.FindStatusCondition respectively, and the import of k8s.io/apimachinery/pkg/api/meta was added. The godoc for both functions was updated to note the delegation and the Kubernetes API convention enforcement (non-empty Reason, non-negative ObservedGeneration).

resolution_summary: All three review comments were addressed: RenderPluginConfig now returns an error on duplicate ConfigSection instead of silently overwriting, RenderPastePipeline guards against empty AppName to avoid invalid pipeline directives, and SetCondition/GetCondition now delegate to meta.SetStatusCondition and meta.FindStatusCondition from k8s.io/apimachinery. Additionally, internal/common/plugins/plugins_test.go was updated to handle the new error return from RenderPluginConfig and to add test cases for both the empty-AppName guard and the duplicate-ConfigSection error path.
